tasks.subject: Define Scope and Structure of Aftonbladet Headlines
tasks.description:
Research Question: How does Aftonbladet organize and present its daily headlines on the website (aftonbladet.se)?
Source Priority: Official website (aftonbladet.se), web archive comparisons, media design studies.
Success Criteria: Clear identification of headline tiers (top stories, secondary, breaking news banners) and an understanding of the front-page layout hierarchy.

tasks.subject: Extract Top-Tier Headlines
tasks.description:
Research Question: What are the main/top headlines on Aftonbladet's front page today (June 2, 2026)?
Source Priority: Aftonbladet.se front page, mobile homepage, top-story carousels.
Success Criteria: A curated list of 5-8 primary headlines with exact article titles and a brief subject tag for each story.

tasks.subject: Extract Section-Specific Headlines
tasks.description:
Research Question: What are today's notable headlines across Aftonbladet's major editorial sections (e.g., Sport, Nöje, Kultur, Opinion, Nyheter)?
Source Priority: Aftonbladet.se section landing pages, sub-navigation menus.
Success Criteria: A categorized list of 3-5 significant headlines per major section, with section labels.

tasks.subject: Verify Timeliness and Breaking News Status
tasks.description:
Research Question: Which of the extracted headlines are marked as breaking news, live updates, or published/updated specifically today (June 2, 2026)?
Source Priority: Aftonbladet.se article timestamps, "breaking" labels, live tickers, update logs.
Success Criteria: Confirmation that all listed headlines are from today; identification of any live/updating stories and exact publication/update timestamps where available.
